summary: PracticePage now shows lightweight menu-card image previews using the existing image_url read path, while preserving text-only fallback for missing or broken images and leaving query/type/store/runtime/admin boundaries untouched. npx tsc --noEmit passed, npm run build passed with only the pre-existing Vite chunk-size warning, npm run lint produced no new issues beyond the pre-existing warning at src/hooks/useGameTick.ts:73, and the reported self-reviewer result was pass.
